01 — About

Code meets
craft.

I'm a Front-End Developer specializing in React and Next.js, with a background in Business Administration from Sadat Academy. That combination gives me a practical sense for building interfaces that solve real user problems — not just look good.

I've built full-featured web applications from scratch — e-commerce platforms, social apps, and more — with a focus on responsive design, performance optimization, and clean, reusable code.

I care about the details: semantic HTML for SEO, lazy loading for speed, modular components for maintainability. Currently seeking a full-time front-end role where I can keep pushing the craft forward.
